titleStmt.title: SII 9.257: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 257. (A.R. No. 530 of 1914.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE SANKARESVARA TEMPLE AT UTTANGI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1072, Pramādi, Akshayatṛitīya-Amāvāsye, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Vyatīpāta corresponding probably to A.D. 1150 March 30 Thursday; but there was no solar eclipse on that day. The record refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalla (II) ruling from Kalyāṇapura. It states that when Jagadēkamalla-Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva was governing Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, a gift of land was made for the service of the god Basavēśvara, whose temple had been built by Saudhare-Basavayya at Kuttaṅgi in Kōgaḷi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi śaṁbhavē .
dharaṇimadhyadoḷoppu dakṣiṇabhāgadali bharatakṣē
tra . tatu pariyaṁ śatruku
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu su
khasatukathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yadu
vaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṁḍa rājigacōḷa
manōbhaṁga sāhasōttuṁga nāmādi sama(sama)stapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jagadēkamallavīrapāṁḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattitsāyiramuṁ duṣṭanigrahavisi
ṣṭapratipāḷanaṁgeyvutta Uccaṁgipurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasatukathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yuttamire . śrīmatkuṁtaḷaveṁbudoṁdu viḷasallakṣmīkaraṁ dēśavā bhūmirāmege sa
smitōllasitavakutrāṁbhōruhōddāmaṁ kōgaḷināḍadarkke tiḷakaṁ kuṁta muttama
grāmaṁ tānenisirda danajaṁgaṁ baṇnisalu barkkumē . cittajanacitta duttamana
ndanada suttiniṁ balirājyavettesedu tōṟutirpudu kuttaṁgiya siriyaninnadē baṇnipudō .
Alliya gāvuṁḍagaḷ © keḷeyaṁ koṁḍapeneṁbavaṁgabhayamaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ koṭṭapaṁ kaliba
poccaḷisi balpiṁdāntōvōvenal taleyaṁ cakkane kirttu meṭṭipoḍe śaṁ
ḍaṁ poyidapaṁ bhūribhūtaḷavākaṁpise huṁ babāppeṟakarā daṁgaḷ
vātavaru . vṛtta . toṇḍara gaṁḍanuddhatara gaṁḍanōṟaṁṭara gaṁḍanukkiduddaṁḍara gaṁḍanī bēḍaragaṁḍa
naḍepaḍēmātō mīṟi mārkkoṁḍara gaṁḍanēḷisuvavaṁ vīragaṇḍanenutte bīragāvuṁḍananakkaṟiṁ
poguḷuvudī bhuvanaṁ prajemeccegaṁḍanaṁ . Intu pogarttegaṁ negarttegaṁ neleyāda gāvuṁḍagaḷu śrī
maṁ kuttaṁgiyalu basavēśvaramaṁ māḍisida saudhare basavayyana mahimeyenteṁdaḍe
janakaṁ herggaḍe cācirājamahimaṁ nannavve pettavve pāṁḍyanripaṁ svāmi patibra
tābharaṇamuḷḷā cāmikānteyaṁgane mallaguṇavārddhiśaṁkaranenippa
mikka tējasvigaḷu taneyarssavudharegeṁdoḍī basavaniṁdāvaṁ kritā
rtthātmā Āsadaḷamenisuva dānadoḷaṁ vatya
dhikanenalu pogaḷuguṁ vibudhāḷige hosahoṁgaḷanittu pa
dēvanesevaṁ pusi kanasiṁdaveḷḷanitu tannoḷagittenisirpa hāḷiyeṁ
pasugeyenappukeydu manamaṁ nutaśaṁkaranalli kīlisi paramārtthadiṁ para
hitārtthadoḷācarisutta niṁ basavaṇanandadindesagi jīvisuva kritakri
tyanallanē .
Ī basavēśvaradēvargge pūjepunaskārakkaṁ Aṁgabhōganaivēdyacaitrapavitrakkaṁ ragrā
gaḷaṁ sakavaruṣa sāsiradayeppattayeraḍa pra
mādi tsaradakṣayatritīyamāvāsya sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpāta
dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa tamma bhūmi
yennade rakṣasidargge biṭṭa gileya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu
śrīrāmēśvaradēvara kaya hattira
mattaṁ nandādīvigege yaṁ bi
ṭṭa doḷage ṟida
damaged
biṭṭaru baḷaṁjigaru hēṟida
yiṁ mūḍalu dīvigege soṭige yeṇneyaṁ biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
